Summary: 10 papers retrieved, 0 relevant. The evidence tier is **none**. The retrieved set is dominated by TFDP1 cell-cycle/oncology work and off-target TFDP3 papers; the papers that actually address TCR inhibition concern a different molecule (PTPN22), so nothing materially connects TFDP1 to TCR inhibition or a related inhibitory T cell phenotype. Confidence is high because papers were returned and could be assessed.

parsed.tier_rationale: No retrieved primary study links TFDP1 to TCR inhibition or a related inhibitory T cell phenotype. TFDP1-specific papers (PMC11347378, PMC12740773, PMC11637825) address cell-cycle/proliferation in non-T-cell contexts. Half the results concern TFDP3, a different gene. The only TCR-inhibition study (PMC11237943) is about PTPN22, and the TCR repertoire review (PMC12346228) never mentions TFDP1.
